metaData.Key Information: High Density Polyethene Plastic Bag (HDPE) is the most economical and hygienic mean for packing and storage of foodstuff. These plastic food bags are perfect for use in holding breads, rolls, biscuits, snacks and many more. They come in flat pack, meaning each bag is separated and ready to use! Each bag size is 254mm x 305mm. Approximately 770 grams per pack.
metaData.SAP Product Name: MTRADE HDPE Plastic Food Bags (10 Inch x 12 Inch)
metaData.Storage Information: Keep product at a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight
